zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Ralph Bowes於大約1454年出生在英國達勒姆斯特亞特拉姆 安德 斯泰頓時，他的父親William Bowes40歲，母親Maud Fitzhugh27歲。他與Margaret Conyers結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1533年8月13日在他的家鄉享年80歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德艾德林加姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Ralph Bowes于大约1454年出生在英国達勒姆斯特亞特拉姆 安德 斯泰頓时，他的父亲William Bowes40岁，母亲Maud Fitzhugh27岁。他与Margaret Conyers结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1533年8月13日在他的家乡享年80岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德艾德林加姆。

nameMeanings.name: Bowes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern): habitational name from Bowes (formerly in North Yorkshire, now in County Durham), or from some other place so called, the placename being derived from the plural of Old English boga ‘bow’, here referring to bends in a river. Alternatively, a topographic name for someone who lived ‘(at the) arches or bridge’. See Bow 1.
English: variant of Bow , with excrescent -s.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Buadhaigh (see Bogue ).

variants.name: Bow
meanings: Scottish and English: habitational name from any of various minor places called with Old English boga ‘bow, arch, vault’, i.e. an arched bridge. There are places so called in Midlothian, Middlesex, and Devon.
Irish and English: variant of   Bowes  .

Chinese: possibly from Cantonese form of the Chinese names 寶 (meaning ‘treasure’) or 保 (meaning ‘protect’), which were monosyllabic personal names or part of disyllabic personal names of some early Chinese immigrants in the US.

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Ralph Bowes was born about 1454, in Streatlam and Stainton, Durham, England, his father, William Bowes, was 40 and his mother, Maud Fitzhugh, was 27. He married Margaret Conyers. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died on 13 August 1533, in his hometown, at the age of 80, and was buried in Edlingham, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Ralph Bowes est né environ 1454, à Streatlam and Stainton, Durham, Angleterre, son père, William Bowes, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Maud Fitzhugh, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Conyers. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé le 13 août 1533, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 80 ans, et a été enterré à Edlingham, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Ralph Bowes um 1454 in Streatlam and Stainton, Durham, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Bowes 40 und seine Mutter Maud Fitzhugh 27. Er hat Margaret Conyers geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb am 13. August 1533 im Alter von 80 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Edlingham, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Ralph Bowes è nato il circa 1454 nel Streatlam and Stainton, Durham, England, il suo padre, William Bowes, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Maud Fitzhugh, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Conyers. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì il 13 agosto 1533, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 80 anni, e fu sepolto a Edlingham, Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph Bowesが約1454年にイギリスダルハムストレアトラム アンド スティイントンで生まれた時，父William Bowesは40歳，母Maud Fitzhughは27歳であった。Margaret Conyersと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1533年8月13日に故郷で80歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドエドリンガムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph Bowes(이)가 대략 1454년 영국 뒤람 스트리틀램 앤드 스테인턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Bowes(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Maud Fitzhugh(은)는 27세였다. 그는 Margaret Conyers(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1533년 8월 13일 그의 고향에서 80세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 에들링함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Ralph Bowes nasceu aproximadamente 1454, em Streatlam and Stainton, Durham, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Bowes, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Maud Fitzhugh, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Conyers. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu em 13 de agosto de 1533, em sua cidade natal, com 80 anos, e foi sepultado em Edlingham, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Ralph Bowes родился около 1454 г. в местности стритлэм анд стеинтон, дурам, Англия, его отцу по имени William Bowes было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud Fitzhugh, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Conyers. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер 13 августа 1533 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 80 лет и был похоронен в местности эдлингхам, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Ralph Bowes nació aproximadamente 1454, en Streatlam and Stainton, Durham, Inglaterra, su papá, William Bowes, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Maud Fitzhugh, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Margaret Conyers. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió el 13 de agosto de 1533, en su pueblo, a la edad de 80 años, y fue sepultado en Edlingham, Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
